description: The 'legacy-finance-app' project contains a file 'CurrencyConfig.java' that was originally created on Windows using Windows-1252 encoding. IntelliJ IDEA is currently interpreting it as UTF-8, causing special currency symbols (Euro, Pound, Yen) to display as garbage characters or replacement symbols (). Fix the display of 'src/main/java/com/legacy/finance/CurrencyConfig.java' by reloading it in Windows-1252 and then converting it to UTF-8. Change the project's line separators to Unix (LF) and configure the Project Encoding settings to UTF-8. Verify the fix by running the 'CurrencyTest' unit tests.
